facts.WORKFLOW_RULES: * Playwright e2e tests use workers: 1 because BCryptPasswordEncoder (1-22s per comparison under load) causes request contention under parallel execution * Playwright e2e tests use page.addInitScript() to set localStorage.setItem('axolotl_token', token) before Vue initializes to bypass the route guard redirect to /login
facts.ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS: * VueFlow nodeTypes map in BlueprintView.vue wraps components with markRaw() because Vue script setup reactive proxies break component instance tracking during updateComponent, causing instance.update is not a function on node selection * --border-color is the canonical border variable in tokens.css; --border kept as backward-compat alias * tokens.css uses constrained scales: --space-1 through --space-8 (4px→64px) for spacing, --text-xs through --text-3xl (12px→36px) for type, --icon-sm/md/lg (16/20/24px) for icon sizing * Backend uses BCryptPasswordEncoder (Spring Security) for password hashing; Neo4j stores BCrypt hashes, not SHA-256 * Neo4j is the primary auth store; SQLite must not be used for auth
facts.CONSTRAINTS: * When toggling DOM siblings of a VueFlow component, use v-show instead of v-if to prevent internal DOM references from going stale (Cannot read properties of null (reading 'nextSibling'))
facts.USER_DIRECTIVES: * When generating frontend code, reviewing designs, or advising on visual improvements, apply the Refactoring UI design system: grayscale-first hierarchy, constrained spacing/type scales, systematic color palette, shadow elevation scale, deliberate image/icon treatment, and varied layout compositions
